_note: Draft for P5 two-way field policy. Extracted from references/secret-boundary-protocol.md, references/stage-gates-protocol.md (abstract-metadata-ledger), and scripts/run_stage_gates.py FORBIDDEN_METADATA_KEYS. Enforces BOTH directions: must keep public metadata (no over-redaction) AND must remove credentials. To be placed at config/field-policy.json.
_patch_round2: Added 'institution' to public allowlist (protocol allows it; author-institution-network dimension needs it; same RC4 over-redaction risk). Reworked credential key matching to exact-key / word-boundary matching so whitelisted fields item_key and item_key_hash are NOT falsely flagged as credential 'key'.

public_metadata_allowlist._rule: These are public bibliographic metadata. They MUST be preserved, not redacted to placeholders. Over-redaction of these fields is a violation (this round's RC4).

over_redaction_check._rule: If a row in source_profiles has these fields redacted to placeholder patterns while the source ledger has real values, fail as OVER_REDACTION.

credential_denylist._rule: These must never appear in evidence, handoff, ledger, logs, or git. Presence triggers NO_GO and human review.
credential_denylist._key_matching_rule: Credential key detection MUST use exact field-name match against forbidden_keys OR the value-bearing regexes below. Do NOT use bare substring matching on 'key', which would falsely flag whitelisted item_key / item_key_hash. forbidden_keys are matched as exact lowercased field names only.
credential_denylist._forbidden_keys_note: Matched only as exact lowercased field names. 'key' is intentionally NOT in this list to avoid colliding with item_key/item_key_hash; credential keys are caught via api_key exact match and the value_patterns regexes.

bulk_content_rule._rule: Full text / RAG chunks may be READ and ANALYZED by the chain but must NOT be bulk-exported into evidence or reports. Structured tags, counts, short summaries, source refs and provenance are allowed.
